mnemonics.title: Z-Buffer Mnemonic
mnemonics.content: Z-BUFFER: Zero Buried Points - Buried Complexity Underneath Everything Rendering Clearly. Remember: Z stands for depth (Z-axis), and we keep the CLOSEST object (smallest Z value).

mnemonics.title: Painter's Algorithm Mnemonic
mnemonics.content: PAINTERS: Paint Areas To Insert Rendering Elements Recursively Starting from back-to-front. Think of an artist painting a landscape: sky first (farthest), then mountains, then trees, then flowers (closest).

mnemonics.title: Rendering Pipeline Mnemonic
mnemonics.content: GAP-VTX-PTX-FP: Geometry Application → Vertex Processing → Primitive Assembly → Primitive Processing → Fragment Processing → Framebuffer Operations. Remember: 'Girls Act Very Properly To Please Fancy Gentlemen'
